elements.summary: You built something that works. Customers love it. Revenue grows when you're in the room.Here's the problem.The moment you step away from sales, pipeline dries up. You're the best closer, the only prospector, and the entire marketing team rolled into one. Every deal runs through you.That's not a business. That's a job with equity.And it gets worse. Buyers discount founder-dependent companies 30-50% at exit. Investors see it too. Your best asset — you — is also your biggest liability.So what changes when you break the trap?You wake up to pipeline that filled overnight. Your team runs a system, not guesswork. Revenue stops dipping every time you take a week off. And when it's time to raise, sell, or just breathe — the business holds.That's what I build.I architect GTM operating systems powered by AI automation — workflows that connect your CRM, outbound, content, and analytics into one machine. Then I run a simple playbook:→ More of what's already working→ Better execution across every channel→ New growth levers — only after the first two are maxedYou own the entire system from Day 1. Every tool, every workflow, every SOP. I build it, run it, and hand you the keys.15 years in B2B. 2 SaaS companies. 8 figures in pipeline.DM "GTM" if pipeline depends on you and you're done with that.

currentPositions.description:
Designed by First Responders for First Responders.
With the decommissioning of Mission Manager, your department may be actively looking for a reliable replacement to manage Search and Rescue (SAR), Reserve, Citizen Volunteers, Law Enforcement, and Emergency Response Missions.

 
The available replacement product, called Enforce Assist is a robust, next-generation solution specifically designed to replace the Mission Manager system and provide superior operational capabilities.

The solution is tailored to SAR and Law Enforcement operations. It offers advanced mission tracking, resource allocation, and real-time communication in one comprehensive platform. Our solution ensures that your team’s effective collaboration without missing a beat during this transition.

Enforce Assist key advantages include:

    Seamless Transition: Enforce Assist is designed to replicate and enhance the functionalities you relied on in Mission Manager while adding new features and making the switch smooth and efficient.
    End-to-End Mission Management: From personnel and resource management to live mission updates and mission documentation, Enforce Assist keeps everything at your fingertips.

* Customizable Workflows, screens, and documents: Tailor the platform to suit your department’s specific procedures and operational requirements without the need for extensive coding knowledge.
* Collaboration Tools: Facilitate real-time collaboration among teams, from dispatchers to field personnel, across multiple channels (phone, SMS, chat, social media).
* Real-Time Reporting & Analytics: Gain actionable insights with Advanced Analytics to track KPIs, optimize your mission outcomes and resource utilization.

At Enforce Assist, we specialize in developing solutions tailored specifically to the needs of first responders - solutions that replace outdated systems with cutting-edge technology, enabling faster communication, smarter resource management, and better decision-making in critical moments. I’m committed to helping public safety organizations embrace innovation, ensuring they are prepared to serve their communities with excellence and resilience. At the core of my work is a commitment to bringing law enforcement and emergency services into the future - transforming how they operate so they can continue to protect and serve with the highest level of professionalism.

NatiaveERP supports all verticals of the Real Estate industry from property management, retail to residential, and private equity to public REITs, in a singular purposefully designed solution.

currentPositions.description:
TimeScape™, an employee time, expense, and production tracking software for the mobile field service industry. Simplistic smartphone and non-smartphone mobile field data collection is available, which is used to create timesheets for payroll and job costing. TimeScape™ integrates with dozens of business management software’s such as QuickBooks, Sage, Navision, ADP, and Paychex. 

TimeScape™ differentiates by offering Facial Recognition for secure clock in/out, customizable configurations, auto on-job GPS detection, and optional tracking without a smartphone. We work closely with service-based firms implementing TimeScape into their unique business process.

header.text: Posts on LinkedIn in the last 30 days

elements.summary:
• Visionary problem-solver: With over 20 years of entrepreneurial experience, I’ve built a career around solving high-impact challenges through intuitive, scalable technology - bringing AI and computer vision to life in industries that keep the world moving.

• Founder & CEO of SiteTrax.io: At SiteTrax.io, I lead a team building AI-powered, OCR-based solutions that capture intermodal asset IDs and geolocation in seconds. We’ve made real-time data generation as simple as taking a 3-second video - delivering high-accuracy insights that integrate into TMS, YMS, ERP, and visibility platforms without disrupting existing workflows. From ports and railyards to distribution centers, we’re helping logistics teams work smarter, safer, and more efficiently.

• Founder of HoistCam™: I launched HoistCam to give crane and heavy equipment operators real-time visibility in blind and dangerous zones. This rugged, rapidly deployable wireless camera system is now used across six continents - improving safety, reducing downtime, and enhancing operational awareness on construction sites, marine terminals, and industrial yards.

• Industry thought leader: I regularly speak at global events like IANA Expo, TPM Tech, and Manifest, where I share practical insights on AI adoption, data standardization, and closing visibility gaps in supply chains. I’m also the host of ThoughtLeadership.biz, a podcast where I interview leaders at the intersection of tech, logistics, and innovation.

• Mentor and collaborator: I support startups and emerging leaders in building technologies that are not only effective but easy to use. I believe great solutions don’t require complexity - they require focus, empathy, and execution.

• Nature enthusiast: I find clarity in the outdoors - fishing, swimming and exploring. My love for nature influences how I approach design and problem-solving: practical, sustainable, and people-first.

• Global mindset: From Peru to the Philippines, Germany to Amsterdam, my travels have shaped my perspective and sharpened my ability to build globally adaptable solutions.

I’m proud of the work we’re doing at SiteTrax.io - and more excited than ever about what lies ahead.

Specialties: Entrepreneurial leadership, AI/Computer Vision in logistics, scalable product design, supply chain innovation, strategic partnerships, startup mentorship.

header.text: Posts on LinkedIn in the last 30 days

elements.summary:
Most AI projects don't fail because of the technology. They fail because the foundations weren't ready — messy data, disconnected systems, no governance, and agents running without a real plan.

At LoadSys, we fix that. We build the infrastructure that makes AI actually land: clean data pipelines, agentic systems, and the security frameworks that regulated industries need to move confidently.

We're also building Brunel — an AI development planning platform designed for engineering teams who are already using tools like Cursor or Claude Code but keep hitting a ceiling on complex, multi-file tasks. 

Brunel puts structured planning and verification around the agent, so the team ships what they intended.
Twenty years in tech leadership taught me that the gap between prototype and production is where most of the value gets lost. That's the gap we're closing.

If your AI investments aren't hitting yet, I'd love to talk.

currentPositions.description:
"We make international trade easy, efficient and sustainable." 

Entoss Pomfret Systems (now Blychain Network) was founded with a singular mission: to address the complex challenges faced by the maritime logistics sector through cutting-edge technology. Leveraging our expertise in software development and deep understanding of the industry dynamics, we have innovated a platform called "Pomfret.cloud" tailored to streamline and optimize maritime valuechain. 

Pomfret is a cloud based digital platform of integrated applications for global sea trade value chain – shippers, freight forwarders, ocean carriers, shipping agencies and seaport terminal operators. Our flagship platform not only offers comprehensive solutions for the entire maritime supply chain, but also a platform for sea freight marketplace. 

The platform bridges today’s digital divide among global supply chain stakeholders and enables them to provide and consume maritime services. In simple terms, Pomfret is for global trade services like Uber is for transport services with one difference as services are directly provided and consumed by the users, and the platform only gets the application subscription fees. 

The product development principle is “co-creation and mass customization”.  Since the maritime industry is diverse with different stakeholders from various markets, it might be very complex to build one homogenous application.  Hence, Blychain co-creates the application from a customer segment and customizes it for the specific market or segment. The benefits of the platform are error free data, paperless global trade, and affordable to everyone.
currentPositions.title: Founder and CEO

message.text: You share a common interest with Antony Joseph . They are also a member of Cloud Security Alliance.

elements.summary:
I strongly believe technologies should be affordable to every enterprise regardless of their size. The best way to make it happen is by building industry specific platforms. Through platform, an industry can achieve economies of scale. This is especially true in network centric industries such as maritime industry. 

In global trade, in some cases up to 40, independent actors engaged in a port-to-port or door-to-door voyage. Manual processes and a lack of seamless coordination among these actors lead to longer transit times, delays, poor reliability and the increased cost of maritime logistics services.

We are building a TradeTech platform to make global trade easy, efficient and affordable to every enterprise in the maritime logistics value chain.

elements.summary:
Fire protection service providers are under constant pressure to improve productivity, maintain compliance, and deliver reliable service—yet many still operate with disconnected systems, manual processes, and limited visibility across field and office teams.

I focus on solving that.

I’m a founder of firepro365, where we help fire protection contractors bring together data, people, and processes using Microsoft’s platform, especially Dynamics 365 and the Power Platform. The goal is to streamline operations, improve customer outcomes, and create scalable workflows that work in the real world for service and inspection teams.

With more than 25 years in the CRM and business applications space, I’ve helped organizations plan and implement strategies that use data to improve performance across sales, marketing, customer service, field service, and operations.

Secondarily, I also founded Slickdata, a Microsoft Partner organization delivering expert-level services across Microsoft cloud technologies including Dynamics 365, Office 365, and Azure, helping businesses design roadmaps, integrate systems, and build solutions that improve execution and results.

I enjoy partnering with leaders who want to modernize operations and build a smarter, more connected service organization.
